====Pokémon====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Professor Kukui
|pkmn=Lycanroc
|main=Professor Kukui's Lycanroc
|stage1=Rockruff
|type1=Rock
|img=Kukui Lycanroc Adventures.png
|epnum=PASM04
|epname=The Decision and the Tournament of Six
|desc={{p|Lycanroc}} is Professor Kukui's fourth known Pokémon. As a {{p|Rockruff}}, it was first used to battle Sun's {{p|Incineroar}}, {{adv|Dollar}}, at the [[Iki Town]] festival tournament and lost. Sometime later, it evolved into a {{DL|List of Pokémon with form differences|Lycanroc|Midday}} Form Lycanroc.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Professor Kukui
|pkmn=Snorlax
|stage1=Munchlax
|type1=Normal
|img=Kukui Munchlax Adventures.png
|img_size=170px
|img2=Kukui Snorlax Adventures.png
|img2_size=170px
|epnum=PASM05
|epname=The Announcement and the Prize
|desc={{p|Snorlax}} is Professor Kukui's fifth known Pokémon. It was first used as a {{p|Munchlax}} to battle Sun's Incineroar, {{adv|Dollar}}, at the [[Iki Town]] festival tournament. With its powerful moves and resistance to {{type|Fire}} attacks, Munchlax easily held the advantage over Dollar. By lining its hairballs around the battle field and setting them on fire, Dollar surrounded Munchlax in a field of flames, damaging it enough to knock it out. Later, it was revealed to have evolved into a Snorlax, where it was used to try and prevent a {{p|Celesteela}} and {{p|Guzzlord}} from reaching [[Hokulani Observatory]], only to be defeated.

Snorlax's only known move is {{m|Rollout}}, and its Ability is {{a|Thick Fat}}.}}

=====Given away=====

|trainer=Professor Kukui

|pkmn=Litten

|gender=male
|img=Sun Dollar Litten.png

|desc=This {{p|Litten}} originally belonged to Professor Kukui. He was given to {{adv|Sun}}, who [[nickname]]d him Dollar.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Professor Kukui
|main=Moon's Rowlet
|pkmn=Rowlet
|type1=Grass
|type2=Flying
|gender=male
|img=Professor Kukui Rowlet Adventures.png
|epnum=PASM02
|epname=The Delivery of Rotom and the Girl
|desc={{p|Rowlet}} originally belonged to Professor Kukui. He was first seen being used to test out moves alongside {{p|Popplio}}. He was given to {{adv|Moon}} after seeing how he bonded with her.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Professor Kukui
|pkmn=Popplio
|type1=Water
|img=Professor Kukui Popplio Adventures.png
|epnum=PASM02
|epname=The Delivery of Rotom and the Girl
|desc={{p|Popplio}} is Professor Kukui's first known Pokémon. It was first seen being used to test out moves alongside {{p|Rowlet}}. He later gave it away to [[Hau]].}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Professor Kukui
|pkmn=Rotom
|main=Rotom Pokédex (Adventures)
|type1=Electric
|type2=Ghost
|img=Kukui Rotom Adventures.png
|epnum=PASM01
|epname=The Grand Entrance and Delivery Boy Sun
|desc=Kukui requested that this {{p|Rotom}} be delivered to him in order to combine with {{adv|Sun}}'s Pokédex. Due to its weakness, Rotom was unable to be delivered electronically, so it had to be hand-delivered by {{adv|Moon}}, whose pharmaceutical skills kept it healthy along the way. Once Rotom was delivered, Kukui attempted to try and get it to possess Sun's Pokédex, but Sun's mishandling of the Pokédex left it dirty, causing Rotom to run away in disgust. Later, it combined with Moon's Pokédex to become the [[Rotom Pokédex]].}}
